title: [Sulfur] loomsss’s Better Bricks
description: This resource pack retexture the texture of different kind of bricks!
body:
Are you bored with the current texture of bricks? If you were, then you are lucky to see this!

I recommend you to use loomsss's Better Bricks! This resource pack redesign the texture of different kind of bricks,such as bricks,stone bricks,mud bricks and so much more! So that it looks more attractive!


⚠️**YOU SHOULD KNOW**:

1.You can simply drag this into the resource pack folder, after which everything should work.

2.This resource pack redesign the texture of different kind of bricks in Minecraft and is compatible with Vanilla

## Features:

1.You can see the texture of bricks is much more stronger and harder.

2.Compatible: Runs smoothly with Vanilla.

3.Totaly FREE to download!

4.Simply drag this into the resource pack folder, and click the start button to active the resource pack, DONE! 

# THE NEW SULFUR BLOCK IS OUT NOW! GO CHECK IT OUT
